hero.subtitle: Specialist in Legacy Modularization and AI Agent Workflows

about.title: Julian Hilzinger
about.bio1: With over 10 years of experience in software development and architecture, I specialize in modernizing complex legacy systems, building cloud-native microservice architectures, and strategically integrating AI agents into existing workflows.
about.bio2: As a freelancer since 2022, I help companies connect technical excellence with strategic thinking – from initial architecture design to production deployment including CI/CD, mentoring, and technical leadership.

services.title: My Services
services.subtitle: From architecture design to AI integration – tailored solutions for your business.

items.title: Software Architecture & Engineering
items.desc: Design of scalable backend systems, microservices, and distributed software architectures. Clean code, data modeling, and maintainable system designs.

items.title: AI Transformation & Innovation
items.desc: Building and integrating AI agents and agentic workflows (MCP, N8N), LLM integration, RAG architectures, machine learning, and applied AI research.

items.title: Full-Stack Solutions
items.desc: End-to-end development of web applications and mobile apps (iOS & Android). Cross-platform UI/UX design with modern frameworks like Angular 17+.

items.title: Digital Strategy & Consulting
items.desc: Strategic consulting for digital transformation, design of innovative business models, rapid prototyping, and technical due diligence.

items.title: Immersive Technologies
items.desc: Development of Augmented Reality (Microsoft HoloLens) and Virtual Reality applications for training, product presentation, remote maintenance, and client demos.

items.title: Agile Methods & Tech Lead
items.desc: Professional project management with Scrum, technical project leadership, developer team mentoring, code reviews, and architecture workshops.

skills.title: Tech Stack & Expertise
skills.subtitle: A broad spectrum of modern technologies – from backend engineering to AI development.

experience.title: Professional Experience
experience.subtitle: From university to senior freelancer – a path shaped by innovation and technical growth.

items.desc: Software architecture & AI engineering, cloud-native solutions, technical leadership, digital transformation strategy, Industry 4.0 & rapid prototyping for national and international clients across industry and the public sector.
Module "Mobile Systems and Cloud" – teaching iOS, Android, Azure Cloud, digitalization, software architecture, and mobile systems.

App development (Apple, Android, Web), full stack, AR/VR (HoloLens), machine learning, prototyping new IT technologies, developing innovative business models, project management, IT trade fair appearances (EMO, AMB, METAV).
App development (Apple, Android, Web), full stack, AR/VR, cognitive services, artificial intelligence. Technical project lead for a large-scale project (> 800 man-days).
Development of an ontology editor based on the Java programming language.

projects.title: Selected Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of completed and ongoing freelance projects.

items.title: Herd Management Platform
items.desc: Modularization of an existing monolithic architecture into independent, containerized microservices (Java 21/25, Spring Boot 3). Implementation of MCP server & agents for process automation, CI/CD pipelines, Angular 17+ frontend development.

items.title: Digital Funding Platform
items.desc: Digital platform for managing and analyzing nationwide funding. Microservices architecture with web application, Django admin backend, Spring Boot components, and MySQL database. Project management and software architecture.

items.title: FC Bayern Hackdays – Telekom Challenge
items.desc: Prototype development of an AR application for Microsoft HoloLens to enhance the football experience around the TV. Team leadership and development within 48 hours.
